titleStmt.title: SII 31.161: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 161. (A.R. No. B 226 of 1936.) TSADUM, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Rock near the tank at Mālapalle, a hamlet about a mile to the south of the village.
This is dated in Śaka 1780, Kīlaka, Māgha śu. 6, Irregular.

Worn out, Refers to the construction of stone wall to the tank and donated gift of land for maintaining the repairs to the tank by Suguṭūri Chikarāya Tamme Gaunayyavāru. This inscription seem to the engraved by Ānekanṭṭe Vīra Gaunayyavāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīvijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaraṣaṁbulu 1770 Agunēṭi
kīlakanāma saṁvatsara māgha śu 6 lu śrīmatu suguṭūri cikarāya taṁmmegaunayyavāru śilaceruvu
rāja tamayyēnimityaṁrāyi kaṭṭaḍi śēśivēyiṁcci yiccina dha¨rmmaśāsasaṁ . yīceruvu sāgina
vula vi¨rtta Apinabaḍi mānyāla nē
mānyaṁ ceruvu panikiṁcceśiyiṁcceṭaṭṭu yē¨rpāṭu cēśināraṁ ganaka yīni¨rnnayānaku tappinavā
ru koṁnnā kāśilō brahmahatya gōhatya śiśuhatya cēśina pāpāna pōṁgalavāru . ceruvu A(Ā)ku tōṁ
ṭalakuṁ phaṁḍugaki phalāluṁ ko 81 lekhayettirūkalu ceruvuku paniśēyiṁccagalavāru
yiṭṭani Ānēkaṁṭa vīregavunayyavāru vēyiṁccina dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 31.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
